DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THERE BEING NO APPEARANCES, DEFENDANT BRANDO EMPIRE SAN FRANCISCO, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL GOTHAM BAY CONSTRUCTION CORP. TO PROVIDE FURTHER RESPONSE TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. GOTHAM BAY'S SPECIFICATION OF DOCUMENTS PURSUANT TO CCP 2030.230 IS INADEQUATE BECAUSE, IN RESPONSE TO EACH INTERROGATORY THAT IS THE SUBJECT OF BESF'S MOTION, GOTHAM BAY RESPONDED BY REFERRING BESF TO GOTHAM BAY'S ENTIRE PRODUCTION OF MORE THAN 1,700 PAGES OF DOCUMENTS. SUCH A REFERENCE IN RESPONSE TO AN INTERROGATORY DOES NOT PROVIDE SUFFICIENT DETAIL TO PERMIT BESF TO LOCATE AND TO IDENTIFY, AS READILY AS GOTHAM BAY CAN, THE DOCUMENTS FROM WHICH THE ANSWER TO THE INTERROGATORY MAY BE ASCERTAINED. WITHIN 30 DAYS OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER, GOTHAM BAY SHALL SERVE CODE-COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO BESF'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES 4, 8, 11-14, 16-19, 21-24, 26-36, 41-43 AND 46. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERNST HALPERIN, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion To Strike Complaint (#521524)
Off Calendar Apr-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: WILLIAM FARRER, ESQ., 415.578.2102, FOR DEFENDANT GOTHAM BAY CONSTRUCTION COMPANY.
WILLIAM FISKE, ESQ., 925.943.6570, FOR DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT BRANDO EMPIRE SAN FRANCISCO, LLC, BRANDY HO AND JIMMY KWOK LUNG LAM.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling REGARDING: DEFENDANT BRANDO EMPIRE SAN FRANCISCO, LLC, BRANDY HO, JIMMY LAM'S Notice Of Motion To Strike Complaint. The motion to strike attorney's fees is (1) granted with leave to amend as to the breach of written contract cause of action. Plaintiff has leave to allege, if it can do so in good faith, that the parties entered into the written contract in light of the lack of defendants' signature and par. 14.1.1; (2) granted without leave to amend as to causes of action 2, 4, and 5. Plaintiff concedes that those claims do not support the relief; (3) denied as moot as to the 3rd cause of action based on the demurrer ruling; and (4) denied as to the breach of oral contract cause of action. Plaintiff alleges that the parties orally agreed to the terms of the written contract. The Court needs to take those allegations as true and the Court cannot determine whether the parties actually entered into an oral contract and what the terms of that contract are on a motion to strike. The motion to strike Exhibits I, N and K is granted. The checks are evidentiary in nature; Plaintiff needs only to prove ultimate facts and does not need to attach unredacted checks with bank account numbers. The checks are "improper" within the meaning of CCP 435 and 436. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Off Calendar Mar-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: william farrer, esq., 415.578.2102, for plaintiff/defendant gotham bay construction corporation.
clifford horner, esq., and william fisk, esq., 925.943.6570, for defendant/cross complainants brando empire san francisco, llc, brandy ho amd jimmy kwok lung lam.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT GOTHAM BAY CONSTRUCTION CORPORATION's application FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is Denied as to application for right to attach order as to Brando Empire San Francisco LLC. Plaintiff has not met its burden of establishing that the amount sought by Gotham Bay Construction Corporation ("GBCC") ($686,404.53, including costs of $20,000 and estimated attorney fees of $250,000) is fixed or readily ascertainable. CCP 483.010. GBCC based these amounts on the terms of an unsigned agreement. (Garay Decl. 4, 19-22 and Ex. A.) Even if there was an oral agreement to do some work, the amount is not fixed or readily ascertainable. The quantum meruit claim was raised for the first time in reply. Plaintiff has not shown that the amount sought in quantum meruit recovery is fixed or readily ascertainable. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J.
